nws_forecast.name: Today
nws_forecast.detailed: Patchy fog before noon. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 61. South wind 6 to 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.detailed: Patchy fog between 11pm and 2am. Partly cloudy. Low around 46, with temperatures rising to around 53 overnight. Southwest wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly sunny. High near 57, with temperatures falling to around 44 in the afternoon. North wind 7 to 13 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain showers likely. Cloudy, with a low around 39. East wind 8 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain showers. Cloudy, with a high near 61. South wind 8 to 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain showers before 11pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 39. West wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 52. West wind around 13 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Monday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly cloudy, with a low around 35. West wind 6 to 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of snow showers between 9am and 2pm, then a chance of rain and snow showers. Mostly sunny, with a high near 48. West wind 6 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Partly Cloudy
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain showers before 9pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 30. Northwest wind around 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 46. East wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly clear, with a low around 35. South wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly cloudy, with a low around 44. Southwest wind 9 to 14 mph.
